name: simotwet-coffee-society
description: Simotwet Coffee Society platform managing user coffee deposits, generated receipts, and SMS reports

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server && npm run prepare-dist
scripts.prepare-dist: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/client dist/server && rm -rf dist/server/uploads && mkdir -p dist/server/uploads && cp -R client/dist/* dist/client/ 2>/dev/null || : && cp -R server/dist/* dist/server/ 2>/dev/null || : && cp server/package.json dist/server/
